question: Generate Second/Minute/Hour Pulses from 1 ms Tick
description:
Use counters driven by a 1 ms pulse to generate derived timebase pulses.

' +
        '**Conversion:** `1000 ticks → sec, 60 sec → min, 60 min → hr`

' +
        '**Constraints:**
' +
        '- Each pulse is 1 cycle wide at rollover
' +
        '- Cascaded counters
requirements: COUNT: 1000 ticks => 1 second, 60 seconds => 1 minute, 60 minutes => 1 hour.
PULSE WIDTH: 1 cycle asserted at rollover event.
Test Case - 1000 ticks produce one sec_pulse.
Test Case - 60 sec_pulse events produce one min_pulse.
hints: Use tick_1ms as clock-enable for cascaded counters.
